problem_text_cn: 侧面绝热的圆柱形容器被长L的固态导热介质隔成两等体积区域，封有相同理想气体，区域1质量是区域2的2倍。区域1与T₁热源、区域2与T₂(T₂>T₁)热源热平衡，固态介质温度稳定。1. 求固态介质的温度分布；2. 求两区域分子t时间内位移R₁与R₂的比值；3. 撤去热源系统绝热，求热平衡温度T（νC=2ν₂C_V）。
problem_text_en: A cylindrical container with adiabatic sides is divided into two equal-volume regions by a solid heat-conducting medium of length L，containing the same ideal gas，the mass of region 1 is twice that of region 2. Region 1 is in thermal equilibrium with a heat source of T₁，and region 2 with a heat source of T₂(T₂>T₁)，the temperature of the solid medium is stable。1. Find the temperature distribution of the solid medium；2. Find the ratio of displacements R₁ and R₂ of molecules in the two regions within time t；3. Remove the heat sources and the system is adiabatic，find the thermal equilibrium temperature T（νC=2ν₂C_V）。
problem_solution_cn: （1）温度分布：- 稳定热传导温度梯度恒定，T(x)=(T₂-T₁)x/L + T₁（x从0到L）。（2）位移比值：- R=√(2v̄λt)，v̄∝√T，λ∝T/p，p₁=2ν₂RT₁/V，p₂=ν₂RT₂/V，得R₁/R₂=(T₁/T₂)^(1/4)/√2。（3）热平衡温度：- 吸热等于放热，2ν₂C_V(T-T₁) + ν₂C_V(2T-T₁-T₂)=ν₂C_V(T₂-T)，解得T=(3T₁+2T₂)/5。
problem_solution_en: （1）Temperature distribution：- The temperature gradient is constant for stable heat conduction，T(x)=(T₂-T₁)x/L + T₁（x from 0 to L）。（2）Displacement ratio：- R=√(2v̄λt)，v̄∝√T，λ∝T/p，p₁=2ν₂RT₁/V，p₂=ν₂RT₂/V，we get R₁/R₂=(T₁/T₂)^(1/4)/√2。（3）Thermal equilibrium temperature：- Heat absorption equals heat release，2ν₂C_V(T-T₁) + ν₂C_V(2T-T₁-T₂)=ν₂C_V(T₂-T)，solving gives T=(3T₁+2T₂)/5。
